requirement_topic.en: SIE / Distributor Grid Interconnection — 120/240 V, 60 Hz Reconfiguration and Anti-Islanding
requirement_topic.zh: SIE / 配电公司并网——120/240 V、60 Hz重新配置及防孤岛
requirement_topic.zht: SIE / 配電公司併網——120/240 V、60 Hz重新配置及防孤島

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverter projects in the Dominican Republic should be reviewed through the applicable SIE electricity-sector framework and the serving distributor's interconnection process, commonly EDENORTE, EDESUR, or EDEESTE. The key technical issue for China-origin inverters is that the Dominican Republic is an Americas-style 60 Hz market with 120/240 V low-voltage service, not a China-style 50 Hz 220/380 V market. Inverter firmware, protection thresholds, reconnection delays, anti-islanding detection, voltage/frequency ride-through behavior, nameplate ratings, and commissioning locks should therefore be configured and validated for 120/240 V at 60 Hz before SIE/distributor review and site commissioning.
summary.zh: 多米尼加共和国并网光伏逆变器项目应按适用的SIE电力行业框架和供电配电公司的接入程序审查，通常涉及EDENORTE、EDESUR或EDEESTE。中国来源逆变器的关键技术问题是，多米尼加共和国属于美洲式60 Hz、120/240 V低压供电市场，而非中国式50 Hz、220/380 V市场。因此，逆变器固件、保护阈值、重连延时、防孤岛检测、电压/频率穿越行为、铭牌额定值和调试锁定，应在SIE/配电公司审查和现场调试前按120/240 V、60 Hz配置并验证。
summary.zht: 多明尼加共和國併網光伏逆變器項目應按適用的SIE電力行業框架和供電配電公司的接入程序審查，通常涉及EDENORTE、EDESUR或EDEESTE。中國來源逆變器的關鍵技術問題是，多明尼加共和國屬於美洲式60 Hz、120/240 V低壓供電市場，而非中國式50 Hz、220/380 V市場。因此，逆變器韌體、保護閾值、重連延時、防孤島檢測、電壓/頻率穿越行為、銘牌額定值和調試鎖定，應在SIE/配電公司審查和現場調試前按120/240 V、60 Hz配置並驗證。

standards_or_laws: SIE electricity-sector regulation and technical supervision
Distributor interconnection requirements for EDENORTE / EDESUR / EDEESTE service territories
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Dominican Republic low-voltage grid practice: 120/240 V, 60 Hz

summary.en: China-side grid evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, and GB/T 37408 for grid-connected PV inverter technical requirements. These files are generally built around China's 50 Hz grid and 220/380 V low-voltage assumptions. They do not prove that the same inverter hardware, firmware profile, protection settings, relays, magnetics, thermal behavior, and anti-islanding detection have been validated for the Dominican Republic's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid.
summary.zh: 中国侧并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范，以及GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求。这些文件通常基于中国50 Hz电网及220/380 V低压假设，不能证明同一逆变器硬件、固件配置、保护参数、继电器、磁性器件、热行为和防孤岛检测已针对多米尼加共和国60 Hz / 120-240 V电网验证。
summary.zht: 中國側併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範，以及GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求。這些文件通常基於中國50 Hz電網及220/380 V低壓假設，不能證明同一逆變器硬體、韌體配置、保護參數、繼電器、磁性器件、熱行為和防孤島檢測已針對多明尼加共和國60 Hz / 120-240 V電網驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A China 50 Hz grid profile cannot be shipped as the default Dominican Republic configuration. Exporters should provide the Dominican Republic grid profile, firmware version matrix, 60 Hz anti-islanding evidence under IEC 62116, IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, voltage/frequency trip windows, reconnection logic, installer lock procedure, and commissioning record template for the distributor. If the inverter was type-tested only at China 50 Hz / 220-380 V settings, reconfiguration and retesting should be planned before the SIE/distributor interconnection package is finalized.
gap.zh: 差距：中国50 Hz电网配置不能作为多米尼加共和国默认配置发运。出口商应提供多米尼加共和国电网配置、固件版本矩阵、IEC 62116下的60 Hz防孤岛证据、IEC 61727并网接口证据、电压/频率跳闸窗口、重连逻辑、安装方锁定程序及提交配电公司的调试记录模板。若逆变器仅在中国50 Hz / 220-380 V参数下完成型式试验，应在最终确定SIE/配电公司并网文件包前安排重新配置和重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國50 Hz電網配置不能作為多明尼加共和國預設配置發運。出口商應提供多明尼加共和國電網配置、韌體版本矩陣、IEC 62116下的60 Hz防孤島證據、IEC 61727併網介面證據、電壓/頻率跳脫窗口、重連邏輯、安裝方鎖定程序及提交配電公司的調試記錄模板。若逆變器僅在中國50 Hz / 220-380 V參數下完成型式試驗，應在最終確定SIE/配電公司併網文件包前安排重新配置和重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as a practical SIE/distributor interconnection and commissioning gate for grid-tied systems; the installed inverter settings must match the Dominican Republic grid and project approval
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese 50 Hz grid evidence supports China domestic grid acceptance only and is not transferable to Dominican Republic distributor interconnection review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat the Dominican Republic as a 120/240 V, 60 Hz grid market and lock that profile before shipment or commissioning. China 50 Hz / 220-380 V evidence does not prove SIE or distributor interconnection acceptance. Confirm current SIE rules and EDENORTE, EDESUR, or EDEESTE project requirements before final equipment submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将多米尼加共和国作为120/240 V、60 Hz电网市场处理，并在出货或调试前锁定该配置。中国50 Hz / 220-380 V证据不能证明可被SIE或配电公司接受并网。最终提交设备文件前，请核实现行SIE规则及EDENORTE、EDESUR或EDEESTE项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將多明尼加共和國作為120/240 V、60 Hz電網市場處理，並在出貨或調試前鎖定該配置。中國50 Hz / 220-380 V證據不能證明可被SIE或配電公司接受併網。最終提交設備文件前，請核實現行SIE規則及EDENORTE、EDESUR或EDEESTE項目要求。

requirement_topic.en: CNE Net-Metering and Renewable Incentive Context — Project Gate Separate from China Certificates
requirement_topic.zh: CNE净计量及可再生能源激励背景——独立于中国证书的项目门槛
requirement_topic.zht: CNE淨計量及可再生能源激勵背景——獨立於中國證書的項目門檻

summary.en: The Dominican Republic has a mature net-metering context for renewable self-generation, with CNE publishing a dedicated Programa de Medición Neta service. For rooftop and commercial PV projects, this programme context does not replace equipment safety, grid-interface, anti-islanding, EMC, or distributor interconnection evidence. It is a project and tariff/crediting gate that should be coordinated with CNE, SIE, and the serving distributor while the inverter documentation is prepared for the Dominican 60 Hz grid.
summary.zh: 多米尼加共和国针对可再生能源自发自用已有较成熟的净计量背景，CNE公布了专门的“净计量计划”服务。对于屋顶和商业光伏项目，该计划背景不能替代设备安全、并网接口、防孤岛、EMC或配电公司接入证据。它是项目及电价/抵扣层面的门槛，应在为多米尼加60 Hz电网准备逆变器文件时，与CNE、SIE和供电配电公司协调。
summary.zht: 多明尼加共和國針對可再生能源自發自用已有較成熟的淨計量背景，CNE公布了專門的「淨計量計畫」服務。對於屋頂和商業光伏項目，該計畫背景不能替代設備安全、併網介面、防孤島、EMC或配電公司接入證據。它是項目及電價/抵扣層面的門檻，應在為多明尼加60 Hz電網準備逆變器文件時，與CNE、SIE和供電配電公司協調。

standards_or_laws: EDENORTE / EDESUR / EDEESTE distributor interconnection process

summary.en: China distributed PV approvals, grid-operator acceptance, or domestic certificates do not create eligibility for Dominican Republic net-metering crediting or distributor interconnection. Chinese documents may support technical due diligence, but CNE/SIE/distributor project review is local.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏审批、电网运营商验收或国内证书，并不会产生多米尼加共和国净计量抵扣或配电公司接入资格。中国文件可支持技术尽调，但CNE/SIE/配电公司项目审查属于当地程序。
summary.zht: 中國分散式光伏審批、電網營運商驗收或國內證書，並不會產生多明尼加共和國淨計量抵扣或配電公司接入資格。中國文件可支持技術盡調，但CNE/SIE/配電公司項目審查屬於當地程序。

gap.en: Gap: Do not treat CNE net-metering eligibility as product certification, and do not treat China product certification as CNE net-metering eligibility. The project file should separately show CNE/SIE/distributor application status, utility meter/interconnection requirements, and inverter technical evidence configured for Dominican 60 Hz service.
gap.zh: 差距：不应将CNE净计量资格视为产品认证，也不应将中国产品认证视为CNE净计量资格。项目文件应分别显示CNE/SIE/配电公司申请状态、公用事业电表/接入要求，以及按多米尼加60 Hz供电配置的逆变器技术证据。
gap.zht: 差距：不應將CNE淨計量資格視為產品認證，也不應將中國產品認證視為CNE淨計量資格。項目文件應分別顯示CNE/SIE/配電公司申請狀態、公用事業電表/接入要求，以及按多明尼加60 Hz供電配置的逆變器技術證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the project seeks net-metering treatment or renewable-incentive handling; separate from product safety and grid technical evidence
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic approvals do not confer Dominican Republic net-metering or incentive eligibility

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CNE net-metering is a Dominican Republic project gate, not a substitute for inverter safety, EMC, anti-islanding, or distributor interconnection evidence. Keep the CNE/SIE/distributor application trail separate from China certificates and verify current CNE net-metering procedures before project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CNE净计量是多米尼加共和国项目门槛，不替代逆变器安全、EMC、防孤岛或配电公司接入证据。应将CNE/SIE/配电公司申请流程与中国证书分开管理，并在项目提交前核实现行CNE净计量程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CNE淨計量是多明尼加共和國項目門檻，不替代逆變器安全、EMC、防孤島或配電公司接入證據。應將CNE/SIE/配電公司申請流程與中國證書分開管理，並在項目提交前核實現行CNE淨計量程序。
